name: Italian Baked Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the bread crumbs and cheese in a bowl.
2. Combine the eggs and olive oil in another bowl.
3. Dip each chicken piece in the egg mixture, quickly lifting to coat with the crumb and cheese mixture.
4. Arrange the chicken pieces in a lightly greased pan and dot each piece with butter.
5. Bake at 375°F for about 1 hour, or until cooked through.
Stuffed artichoke lovers will love this dish; it tastes like it.
